name: Century Ginwa Retail Holdings Limited
summary: Century Ginwa Retail Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates department stores, a shopping mall, and supermarkets in the People's Republic of China. The company owns and operates five department stores, one shopping mall, and seven supermarkets. It also engages in the properties management activities. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
